dashboard.label: PhishIQPlus - Correlation
dashboard.description: Trace dynamic enrichment events back to upstream source events.

search.query: index=$idx$ sourcetype=$st$ phishiq_source_event_hash=* | stats count as enriched_events values(phishiq_source_event_source) as source values(phishiq_source_event_sourcetype) as source_sourcetype by phishiq_source_event_hash | sort - enriched_events | head 20

panel.title: Recent enrichment events with source context

search.query: index=$idx$ sourcetype=$st$ phishiq_source_event_hash=* | table _time url phishiq_original_url phishiq_prediction phishiq_risk_level phishiq_source_event_time phishiq_source_event_host phishiq_source_event_source phishiq_source_event_sourcetype phishiq_source_event_hash | sort - _time
